name: EMSA / Electrophoretic Mobility Shift Assay (Gel Shift)
nameCn: 凝胶阻滞实验（EMSA / 电泳迁移率变动分析）

components.name: 1. Prepare labeled probe (dsDNA or ssRNA, 20–40 bp)

note.en: Fluorescent (IRDye 700/800, FAM): anneal complementary oligos 95°C 5 min → slow cool to RT in TE. ³²P: T4 PNK 5'-end labeling 37°C 30 min; purify G-25 spin column. Final probe: 1–10 nM.
note.zh: 荧光标记（IRDye 700/800、FAM）：互补寡核苷酸 95°C 5 min → 缓慢降温至 RT。³²P 标记：T4 PNK 5' 末端标记 37°C 30 min；G-25 柱纯化。探针终浓度 1–10 nM。

note.en: emsa_binding_buffer + 1 µg poly(dI:dC) as nonspecific competitor. Titrate protein: 0, 10, 50, 100, 500 nM. Add all except probe/protein first.
note.zh: emsa_binding_buffer + 1 µg poly(dI:dC) 非特异性竞争。蛋白梯度：0、10、50、100、500 nM。先加除探针和蛋白外的所有组分。

components.name: 3. Add protein (last before probe); mix gently

note.en: Protein titration: 0.1 nM–1 µM. Add probe after protein. Do not vortex.
note.zh: 蛋白梯度 0.1 nM–1 µM。加完蛋白后再加探针。勿涡旋。

components.name: 4. Incubate 20–30 min, RT (or ice for unstable complexes)

note.en: RT for most TF-DNA. 4°C if RT gives smear (unstable complex).
note.zh: 大多数转录因子-DNA 互作在 RT。不稳定复合物在 4°C。

components.name: 5. Cast & pre-run native PAGE (5–10% acrylamide, 0.5× TBE)

note.en: Pre-run 100 V, 1 h, 4°C. 5% for large complexes; 8–10% for small probes (<100 bp).
note.zh: 预电泳 100 V，1 h，4°C。5% 适合大复合物；8–10% 适合小探针（<100 bp）。

components.name: 6. Load samples (no SDS); use 50% glycerol as loading aid

note.en: Add 2 µL 50% glycerol. Load free-probe-only control in last lane.
note.zh: 加 2 µL 50% 甘油助沉。最后泳道加游离探针对照。

note.en: Run slowly — complexes are fragile. BPB should migrate to ~¾ gel length.
note.zh: 慢速电泳（复合物脆弱）。溴酚蓝迁移至凝胶 ~¾ 处停止。

note.en: Fluorescent: scan wet or dry gel (LI-COR). ³²P: fix in 10% MeOH + 10% AcOH 30 min, vacuum dry, expose overnight. Shifted band = complex; free probe at bottom.
note.zh: 荧光：LI-COR 直接扫描。³²P：10% MeOH + 10% AcOH 固定 30 min，真空干燥，曝光过夜。上移条带 = 复合物；底部 = 游离探针。

components.name: 9. Supershift (optional): add antibody 1–5 µg, incubate 30 min before loading

note.en: Supershift = further retardation (confirms protein identity). Disruption = loss of shift.
note.zh: 超阻滞 = 进一步迁移率降低（确认蛋白身份）。抗体干扰 = 阻滞消失。

note.en: Specific competitor → signal disappears. Scrambled sequence → signal maintained. Proves binding specificity.
note.zh: 特异性竞争 → 信号消失。乱序序列 → 信号保留。证明结合特异性。

notes.en: Controls: (1) no protein, (2) excess unlabeled specific probe, (3) scrambled competitor. Kd ≈ [protein] at 50% probe shifted. Troubleshooting: no shift → more protein; smear → run at 4°C or reduce ionic strength.
notes.zh: 对照：(1) 无蛋白、(2) 过量未标记特异探针、(3) 乱序竞争。Kd ≈ 50% 探针阻滞时的蛋白浓度。排查：无阻滞 → 增加蛋白；拖尾 → 4°C 电泳或降低离子强度。

ref: Hellman & Fried (2007) Nat Protoc 2:1849–1861; Fried & Liu (1994) Mol Microbiol 14:1083

usage.en: Detect protein-DNA interactions by electrophoretic mobility shift assay (EMSA/gel shift).
usage.zh: 电泳迁移率变动实验（EMSA）检测蛋白质-DNA 相互作用。

briefSteps.en: Prepare labeled DNA probe (fluorescent or ³²P) → set up binding reactions with titrated protein and poly(dI:dC) competitor → incubate 20–30 min at RT → pre-run native PAGE (5–10% acrylamide, 0.5× TBE) at 100 V for 1 h at 4°C → load samples and run gel 100–150 V, 1–2 h at 4°C → visualize shifted bands by fluorescent imager or phosphorimager → optional supershift or competition assay
briefSteps.zh: 制备标记 DNA 探针（荧光或 ³²P）→ 加入梯度蛋白和 poly(dI:dC) 竞争剂配制结合反应 → RT 孵育 20–30 min → 天然 PAGE（5–10% 丙烯酰胺、0.5× TBE）4°C 100 V 预电泳 1 h → 上样，4°C 100–150 V 电泳 1–2 h → 荧光成像仪或磷光成像仪检测迁移条带 → 可选超阻滞或竞争实验

detailedSteps.en: Prepare labeled DNA probe: anneal complementary oligonucleotides (20–40 bp) at 95°C for 5 min, then slow-cool to RT over 45–60 min. For fluorescent probes (IRDye 700/800 or FAM), use at 1–10 nM. For ³²P: label with T4 PNK at 37°C for 30 min; purify on G-25 spin column.
detailedSteps.zh: 制备标记 DNA 探针：互补寡核苷酸（20–40 bp）95°C 退火 5 min，缓慢降温至室温（45–60 min）。荧光探针（IRDye 700/800 或 FAM）终浓度 1–10 nM；³²P 标记：T4 PNK 37°C 30 min，G-25 柱纯化。

detailedSteps.en: Cast and pre-run native PAGE: 5% acrylamide for large complexes or 8–10% for small probes (<100 bp), 0.5× TBE buffer, 4°C. Pre-run at 100 V for 1 h at 4°C to equilibrate gel and remove charged impurities.
detailedSteps.zh: 制备天然 PAGE 凝胶并预电泳：大分子复合物用 5%，小探针（<100 bp）用 8–10%，0.5× TBE 缓冲液，4°C，100 V 预电泳 1 h。

detailedSteps.en: Prepare binding reactions (10–20 µL each): combine EMSA binding buffer + 1 µg poly(dI:dC) nonspecific competitor + protein at 0, 10, 50, 100, and 500 nM. Add all components except protein and probe first; add protein last, then probe.
detailedSteps.zh: 配制结合反应（每管 10–20 µL）：EMSA 结合缓冲液 + 1 µg poly(dI:dC) 非特异竞争剂 + 蛋白梯度（0、10、50、100、500 nM）。先加除蛋白和探针外的所有组分，最后加蛋白，再加探针。

detailedSteps.en: Incubate binding reactions 20–30 min at RT. For unstable complexes, incubate at 4°C. Do NOT vortex; mix gently by flicking tube.
detailedSteps.zh: 结合反应室温孵育 20–30 min；不稳定复合物可在 4°C 孵育。勿涡旋，轻弹管壁混匀。

detailedSteps.en: Add 2 µL of 50% glycerol to each reaction as loading aid (final ~6–8% glycerol to sink samples). Load samples without SDS. Load free-probe-only control in the last lane.
detailedSteps.zh: 每管加入 2 µL 50% 甘油作为上样辅助（终浓度约 6–8%）。勿加 SDS。最后泳道加游离探针对照。

detailedSteps.en: Run electrophoresis at 100–150 V for 1–2 h at 4°C. Run slowly — complexes are fragile. Stop when bromophenol blue has migrated ~¾ of the gel length.
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C 100–150 V 电泳 1–2 h。慢速电泳，避免复合物解离。溴酚蓝迁移至凝胶约 3/4 处停止。

detailedSteps.en: Visualize results: Fluorescent probes — scan gel wet on LI-COR infrared scanner. ³²P probes — fix gel in 10% methanol + 10% acetic acid for 30 min, vacuum dry, expose to phosphorimager screen overnight. Shifted band = protein-DNA complex; free probe at bottom of gel.
detailedSteps.zh: 结果检测：荧光探针——LI-COR 红外扫描仪直接扫描湿凝胶。³²P——10% 甲醇 + 10% 乙酸固定 30 min，真空干燥，磷光成像板曝光过夜。上移条带 = 蛋白-DNA 复合物；底部 = 游离探针。

detailedSteps.en: Optional supershift: before loading, add 1–5 µg antibody against the protein of interest to the binding reaction; incubate additional 30 min at RT. A further-shifted band confirms protein identity.
detailedSteps.zh: 可选超阻滞验证：上样前向结合反应中加入 1–5 µg 靶蛋白抗体，RT 再孵育 30 min。产生更明显的阻滞条带可确认蛋白身份。

detailedSteps.en: Optional competition assay: add 10×–100× molar excess of unlabeled specific (same sequence) or nonspecific (scrambled) competitor DNA before adding labeled probe. Specific competitor eliminates shift; scrambled sequence maintains shift. This confirms binding specificity.
detailedSteps.zh: 可选竞争实验：加标记探针前加入 10–100 倍摩尔过量的未标记特异性（同序列）或非特异性（乱序）竞争 DNA。特异性竞争使信号消失；乱序竞争信号保留，证明结合特异性。

note.en: Annealed and labeled probe can be stored at −20°C (fluorescent) or −80°C (³²P, use within 2 weeks) until needed.
note.zh: 退火后的标记探针可 −20°C 保存（荧光探针）或 −80°C 保存（³²P，需在 2 周内使用）。
